allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe","C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; $cmd = Get-Command git.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { Write-Output \("CMD: " + $cmd.Source\) })

PowerShell($git = "C:\\Users\\20260898\\AppData\\Local\\GitHubDesktop\\app-3.5.12\\resources\\app\\git\\cmd\\git.exe"; Write-Output "==== last commit ===="; & $git log -1 --stat --oneline; Write-Output "==== working tree status ===="; & $git status --short; Write-Output "==== are the 3 files tracked? ===="; & $git ls-files _config.yml _pages/contact.md _pages/teaching.md; Write-Output "==== ignored? ===="; & $git check-ignore _config.yml _pages/contact.md _pages/teaching.md)

PowerShell($git = "C:\\Users\\20260898\\AppData\\Local\\GitHubDesktop\\app-3.5.12\\resources\\app\\git\\cmd\\git.exe"; Write-Output \("PWD: " + \(Get-Location\).Path\); Write-Output \("TOPLEVEL: " + \(& $git rev-parse --show-toplevel\)\); Write-Output \("GITDIR: " + \(& $git rev-parse --absolute-git-dir\)\); Write-Output "==== on-disk about.md head \(first 16 lines\) ===="; Get-Content "_pages\\about.md" -TotalCount 16)
